Roof Deck Insulation
Various materiels, e.g., fiberboard, fiberglass, perlite, extruded
polystyrene, etc., based on thickness
(0010) minimum
(0020) average

Minimum suggested crew size: one builder and one laborer.

Notes:
1. The installation of insulation includes scaffolding when required, fastening insulation into place, and
cut-outs in insulation, as required.
2. One hundred sixty staples are required per 100 SF.

Vapor Retarders
(0010) Various materiels, e.g., aluminum and kraft, foil one side or two
